subject: New Request: Software Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

NordKart (e-commerce) is looking for a senior Software Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:

  • Start: 2020-02-25
  • Duration: 3 months
  • Location: Stockholm (on-site)
  • Rate: up to 875 SEK/h

Required tech:

  • Java
  • AWS
  • Docker Compose
  • PostgreSQL

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Oscar Lindgren
Senior Consultant Manager
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 73 233 45 67
